FAMILY LAW JUDICIAL SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2017 Jsc Settled; Agreement Reached
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 416
Hon. Rebecca Wightman
Clerk: Robert Borders
Reporter: Lewis Gillian CSR #12355
Bailiff: Chan

Plaintiff Jaime Tellier present in Pro Per. Respondent Jodi Tellier present In Pro Per.

Both parties agree via stipulation to proceed before JPT Commissioner Wightman.

Both parties sworn and examined

Matter is on calendar for: Judicial Settlement Conference

Based on the testimony and review of the pleadings, Court finds good cause to order the following: case settled.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRIAL COURT)
Off Calendar Jun-05-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Dept: 405
Date: 6/5/2017
Judge: MONICA F. WILEY
Clerk: GERALDINE ANDERSON
Reporter: NOT REPORTED
Deputy: JOHNSON

PLAINTIFF and DEFENDANT present and both in pro per. THE MATTER CAME ON CLAENDAR FOR: DEFENDANT'S compliance review re: title of real estate property. DISCUSSIONS HELD RE: PLAINTIFF'S CURRENT CREDIT REPORT, REMOVAL OF PLAINTIFF'S NAME FROM PROPERTY DEED, ENFORCMENT OF PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT. THE COURT ORDERS PLAINTIFF TO LODGE CURRENT CREDIT REPORT WITH THE CLERK IN ROOM 402. PLAINTIFF SHALL REDACT ANY PERSONAL INFORMATION, I.E. SOCIAL SECURITY NUMBER, ADDRESS, ETC., FROM THE REPORT. CREDIT REPORT SHALL BE SUBMITTED TO THE COURT NO LATER THAN 6-16-17 CLOSE OF BUSINESS DAY. COURT WILL ISSUE AN ORDER UPON RECEIPT.

Notice Of Motion To Issue A Judgment In Favor Of The Defendant For The Offset Of The Balancing Sum Owed To The Plaintiff In The Sum Of $250,000.00 Against The Plaintiff
Off Calendar Jun-05-2017 Text Ruling

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRIAL COURT)
Off Calendar Mar-30-2017 Continued To Jun-05-17 At 01:45 P.M. In Dept 405
MINI MINUTES: 405/JUDGE MONICA WILEY
CLERK: FRANCES YOKOTA
NO REPORTER

Petitioner and Respondent present and both in pro per. The court informed Petitioner that the court system still reflects William Paynter as Petitioner's counsel and if indeed Petitioner is self represented now, a substitution of attorney should be filed with the court ASAP. This matter is before Judge Monica Wiley today for an OSC re: Respondent's failure to comply with court judgment previously entered. This matter is ordered continued to 6-5-17 @ 1:45pm in Dept. 405 before Judge Wiley for Respondent's compliance review re: title of real estate property.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRIAL COURT)
Off Calendar Jan-30-2017 Continued To Mar-30-17 At 01:45 P.M. In Dept 405
MINI MINUTES: (403) 1/30/17
Bench Officer: Judge Monica F. Wiley
Clerk: Dan Leung
Bailiff: Deputy J Gomez

Petitioner present in pro per. Respondent present in pro per. Parties sworn and examined. Based on the testimony set forth on the record, review of the pleadings, evidence submitted and argument and submission, the Court finds good cause to order the following: 1) Respondent is ordered to conduct a title search within 45 days of todays hearing and bring proof that Petitioner is off title. 2) Respondent is ordered to pay Petitioner attorney fees and costs of $5000 within 45 days of todays hearing. If Respondent is unable to pay the full amount, she is ordered to make a good faith effort to pay as much as she can. Matter is continued to 3/30/17 at 1:45pm in Dept. 405. Matter not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRIAL COURT)
Off Calendar Oct-27-2016 Continued To Jan-30-17 At 01:45 P.M. In Dept 403

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Oct-27-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: 403/Judge Monica Wiley
Clerk: Regan Gonzales
Reporter: Sara Lerschen, CSR#6213
Bailiff: Deputy Chen

Harold Jaffe present with Plaintiff Jamie Tellier; Defendant Jodi Tellier present in pro per. Matter is on calendar for motion for withdrawal of attorney of record. Having no opposition, the motion for withdrawal of attorney of record is granted. Matter is also on calendar for status regarding request for Defendant to cooperate in removing Plaintiff's name from a piece of the property. Defendant hands the Court 2 documents: 1) an insurance policy dated 3/4/08 that had both parties' names, and 2) the current insurance policy that has only Defendant's name. Court notes there is no evidence presented that Plaintiff's name has been removed from the deed of trust.

MINI MINUTES: (403) 04/13/16
Bench Officer: Judge Monica F Wiley
Clerk: Dan Leung
Reporter: NA
Bailiff: Deputy J Moret

Harold Jaffe with Plaintiff present. Jodi Tellier present in pro per. Parties sworn and examined. Based on the testimony set forth on the record, review of the pleadings, evidence submitted and argument and submission, the Court finds good cause to order the following: 1) Respondent shall cooperate in novation to remove Petitioner's name from the deed eg Petitioner shall not be named a trustor or obligor 2) Petitioner shall submit a credit report to offer proof that he is not on the mortgage. 3) Court continues request for attorney fees and costs. Entire matter continued to 6/27/16 at 1:45pm in D403. Matter not reported.

Off Calendar Dec-19-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: (404) 12/18/2014

Judge: Monica Wiley Clerk: Priscilla Agbunag Deputy Park

Harold Jaffe with Plaintiff present. Respondent not present. Parties sworn and examined. Motion to enforce Judgment, Civil matter. After argument, submission and review of the pleadings, the Court finds good cause to order the following: Petitioner's Request for orders are hereby granted. Respondent shall have 60-days to effectuate the prior judgement of the Court to remove Petitioner's name from the home. In the event that Respondent does not comply with this order an OSC is set to be heard on 2/18/15 at 1:45pm in Dept. 404. Along with the OSC the Court granted Petitioner's request for Attorney fees for filing this motion and the matter will be heard with the OSC on 2/18/15. Mr. Jaffe to prepare the order. Matter not reported.
